text: For the efficacy evaluation, the SAP mice models were established, and the administration schedule was the same as mentioned above. Mice were divided into eight groups including Negative control, Control, Quercetin, Fc-EV, Anti-Prdx1 Ab, Fc-EV@Que, Ab-Fc-EV@Que, Ab-Fc-EL-EV@Que group. After treatment, mice blood was collected for amylase and lipase analysis, while pancreas and lungs were harvested for later H&E staining. Also, pancreatic tissues were used for more immunofluorescent staining and flow cytometry analysis.
